title: Gina app.crons.json
description: Scheduled task (cron) definitions for a Gina bundle. Each key is a cron name; the value defines the schedule, controller action, and task-specific options.

_comment.description: Top-level documentation comment. Ignored at runtime.

active.description: Whether this cron job is enabled. Set to false to disable without removing the entry.

interval.description: Schedule: either a shorthand duration ("5s", "2m", "24h") or a standard 5-field cron expression ("55 4 * * *").

task.description: Controller action name to invoke on each tick.

processingCores.description: Number of CPU cores to dedicate to this task. Useful for CPU-bound jobs (PDF generation, archiving). Defaults to 1.

_comment.description: Internal documentation comment. Ignored at runtime.
